resources.string: habit
My habits
New Habit
Edit Habit
Progress
Challenges
Settings
Upgrade to Pro
Trust in the Lord with all your heart.
Proverbs 3:5
Today, let go of control and lean on His wisdom.
The Lord is my shepherd; I have all that I need.
Psalm 23:1
Rest in His perfect provision and care today.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid.
Joshua 1:9
Fear has no place in your walk; God is with you.
I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
Philippians 4:13
Your strength comes from Him, not from your own efforts.
But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness.
Matthew 6:33
Align your priorities today with God\'s eternal heart.
Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
Psalm 119:105
Let His Word guide every decision you make today.
Be still, and know that I am God.
Psalm 46:10
In the middle of the noise, find a moment of silence with Him.
Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord.
Colossians 3:23
Every task today is an opportunity to honor God with your excellence.
The joy of the Lord is your strength.
Nehemiah 8:10
Do not let circumstances steal your peace; His joy is your fuel.
Let all that you do be done in love.
1 Corinthians 16:14
Every discipline and interaction today must be rooted in His love.
Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
Matthew 11:28
You don\'t have to carry it all. Lay your burdens at His feet today.
For God has not given us a spirit of fear, but of power and of love.
2 Timothy 1:7
Walk in the authority and sound mind that the Holy Spirit provides.
Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God’s will for you.
1 Thessalonians 5:18
Gratitude changes your perspective. Find three things to thank God for today.
But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength.
Isaiah 40:31
Wait on Him. He is restoring your energy for the path ahead.
I am the way and the truth and the life.
John 14:6
Keep your eyes on Jesus; He is the compass for your daily walk.
Well done! Stay faithful.
